name: fleet-propagate
description: Idempotent fleet-wide config propagation: enumerates host, dev containers, init scripts, and container-creator skills from a per-host manifest, applies changes as marker-delimited managed blocks (rerun-safe), verifies each target, bakes changes into creator skills so future containers inherit them, and reports a per-target changed/verified/needs-manual matrix.

interface.shortDescription: Idempotent fleet-wide config propagation: enumerates host, dev containers, init scripts, and container-creator skills from a per-host manifest, applies changes as marker-delimited managed blocks (rerun-safe), verifies each target, bakes changes into creator skills so future containers inherit them, and reports a per-target changed/verified/needs-manual matrix.
interface.longDescription: Idempotent fleet-wide config propagation: enumerates host, dev containers, init scripts, and container-creator skills from a per-host manifest, applies changes as marker-delimited managed blocks (rerun-safe), verifies each target, bakes changes into creator skills so future containers inherit them, and reports a per-target changed/verified/needs-manual matrix.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use the fleet-propagate plugin for this task.
